title: I made a S&P 500 Dataset
author: Leading-Elevator-313
selftext: [https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/samyakrajbayar/s-and-p-500-complete-historical-dataset-50-years](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/samyakrajbayar/s-and-p-500-complete-historical-dataset-50-years), Feel free to use this dataset. Pls Upvote

comments.author: JeanPaul72
comments.body: do you have chart data in there,   different candles timeframes.  etc...

replies.author: Longjumping-Cook-842
replies.body:
It says exactly what it is in the description. Daily hlocv. Hi, lo, open close is what forms a candlestick you would need to write visualization code or use a program to see it in a chart format. Maybe pull it into powerBI. 

There’s no intraday data but you can aggregate daily into higher timeframes.
